summary: iter266.15 backend testing — all 13 tests PASS. Validated VIP Beverage Pre-Check (POST /vip-precheck, GET /vip-precheck/alerts, POST /vip-precheck/alerts/{id}/resolve) and concierge-desk leader-gate fix on /api/vip-tracker/list. All 6 regression endpoints (vip-tracker auth, availability, find, transfer, chef-outlet dashboard, beo-timeline, labor-brain) green.

minor.issue: resolved_by passed as query param (not body) — non-standard but functional. Consider accepting JSON body.
Substring match on SKU name is case-insensitive but loose — e.g. preferred='Opus' would also sum 'Opus One' stock. Acceptable for now; consider exact-match option.

critical_code_review_comments: beverage_network.py is at ~440 LOC — still within healthy bounds but watch for further growth; the VIP pre-check block could be split to vip_beverage_precheck.py if more endpoints are added.

_expected_qty heuristic divides by 4 to convert pours→bottles which is OK as a heuristic but should be documented in code; party_size=8 + spirit yields expected_need=5 (2.5*8/4), wine yields 3 (1.5*8/4).
vip_beverage_alerts insert swallows all exceptions silently — if Mongo write fails alert_id is None but caller can't distinguish 'no shortfall' vs 'DB error'. Consider logging.
vip_tracker_iter241._is_leader now allows ANY user_id starting with 'concierge-' without DB check — be aware this is permissive by design (per iter266.15 spec) but bypasses employees gate.
test_credentials: X-User-Id: concierge-desk (no auth token required; header-based leader gate)
seed_data_creation: Test created 1 VIP beverage alert via notify=true and 1 beverage_transfers row (sku=TEST_SKU_X). No cleanup necessary — both are append-only audit collections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP pre-check uses substring match on SKU name. Opus One/Ketel One/Macallan 18 must exist in beverage_inventory with on_hand=2/4/6 respectively. _expected_qty at party_size=8: wine→3, spirit→5. To trigger 'shortfall' overall_status, Opus One (on_hand=2 vs need 3) is reliable. concierge-desk X-User-Id now passes leader-gate; chef-william still works.
rca of the issue: N/A — all features green on first run.
